Revenue rose 3% to Rs 11,332 crore, with ARPU reaching Rs 190, the highest in the industry. The company also saw its 4G/5G subscriber base grow and launched 5G services in 83 cities.

The company saw significant growth in express parcel volumes and introduced AI-powered systems. For FY26, Delhivery turned free cash flow positive and achieved a consolidated PAT of Rs 153 crore.

This shift follows Todd Combs' departure and marks a departure from Warren Buffett's historical tech avoidance, with Abel now steering the conglomerate's investment strategy.

business.title: Why Vijay Kedia believes tourism could become India’s next trillion-dollar story
business.summary: Veteran investor Vijay Kedia believes India's tourism sector holds the potential to become a trillion-dollar opportunity. He highlights the nation's immense diversity and scale as key strengths, but stresses that improving infrastructure, cleanliness, and tourist convenience are crucial for unlocking this potential. Focused execution on these basics could transform tourism into a major economic driver.

entertainment.title: Paper Tiger  premieres at Cannes Film Festival: Scarlett Johansson gushes over reuniting with Adam Driver after 7 years
entertainment.summary: Scarlett Johansson reunited with Adam Driver in Paper Tiger seven years after Marriage Story. Here’s what she said about working with him again.

entertainment.title: Ayushmann Khurrana says ‘only family audience’ films for him right now: Maine saare taboo topics khatam kar diye hain
entertainment.summary: Actor Ayushmann Khurrana says right now, he only wants to do films which bring family audiences to theatres; adds taboo subjects limit the audience.

entertainment.title: Shekhar Kapur thinks John Abraham is best suited to play James Bond after Daniel Craig; actor reacts
entertainment.summary: The next actor who will play the iconic role of James Bond has not been announced yet, but filmmaker Shekhar Kapur has voted for Bollywood star John Abraham.

entertainment.title: Why Delhi HC allowed Dhurandhar 2 OTT release with alleged ‘unauthorised’ song; asked for  ₹50 lakh deposit | Explained
entertainment.summary: The Delhi High Court has given its nod to release Aditya Dhar's Ranveer Singh-starrer Dhurandhar 2 on OTT, with the song Rang De Lal. Here's why.

entertainment.title: Shekhar Kapur votes for John Abraham as next James Bond; John says ‘I’ll happily start practising my martini order’
entertainment.summary: Filmmaker Shekhar Kapur has endorsed actor John Abraham as a potential successor to Daniel Craig as James Bond.

entertainment.title: Mithun Chakraborty praises Suvendu Adhikari, says he is the ‘best chief minister West Bengal can have’
entertainment.summary: Suvendu Adhikari became the first BJP chief minister of the state after defeating Trinamool Congress supremo Mamata Banerjee.

entertainment.title: Teary-eyed Ravi Mohan declares he won't act till he is divorced from Aarti Ravi; breaks silence on Keneeshaa Francis

entertainment.title: Vijay Deverakonda cheers for Suriya and Trisha Krishnan as Karuppu dominates box office: ‘It fills all of us with joy’
entertainment.summary: Suriya and Trisha Krishnan's Karuppu finally released in theatres after last minute hiccups. The film has collected  ₹14.40 crore on its first day of release.
